title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 22 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 22 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 22 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 22/09/2025
Iron ore futures held up well today, with intraday performance slightly weakening. The most-traded contract I2601 closed at 808.5,up 0.37% from the previous trading day. Traders showed moderate willingness to sell; steel mills exhibited increased wait-and-see senment, with purchase willingness remaining moderate on Monday.
